preconditions: x must be measured in radians
postconditions: return value is the cosine of x

preconditions: x must be a real number
x must be a number that can be converted to radians
postconditions: The function returns the cosine of x (measured in radians)
The return value is a real number between -1 and 1
edge_cases: x is a very large number (may cause numerical instability)

agreed.hf: x must be a real number

agreed.groq: x must be measured in radians
agreed.hf: x must be a number that can be converted to radians

groq_only: return value is the cosine of x
hf_only: The function returns the cosine of x (measured in radians)
The return value is a real number between -1 and 1
x is a very large number (may cause numerical instability)
